audience: Style-conscious sneaker fans who want high-fashion streetwear moments
creative_direction: Frozen Moments AJ4 candid streetwear. Keep the glance-away crouch as locked. Zoomed creative must be a camera pull-back of that same pose. No campaign text in the image. Add extra product or style refs on Review if you want more fidelity.

products.name: Candid Glance Away
products.asset_hint: LOCKED tight crouch glance-away is the hero. Zoomed creative must be a camera pull-back of that SAME crouch on concrete (same person, pose, outfit, shoes). Forbidden: chair, stool, standing, new pose. No text.
products.notes: Slim sample: one lifestyle hero + one shoe ref. Upload more product angles on Review if needed.
